summary: Full backend + frontend testing of LPOS v1.0 Task Submission & Verification Workflow. All 14 backend tests passed. UI shows 10 tasks correctly with status indicators, SignalMonitor at 84%/OPERATIONAL, pulse=100%. Coach registry correctly redirects non-coach users to /portal.
seed_data_creation: 10 tasks already seeded for test_paid_1773353168 carrier
context_for_next_testing_agent: All LPOS v1.0 features working. GET /api/tasks returns 10 tasks with priority/category/description. Submit endpoint sets status=submitted and boosts pulse to 100. Coach endpoints (verify/remediate/coach/carriers) return 403 for non-coach. Portal shows IMPLEMENTATION_SEQUENCE STANDARD 10 with correct status labels [STATUS: VERIFIED/SUBMITTED/PENDING] and color-coded left borders. Coach registry at /coach-registry correctly redirects non-coach to /portal. Price $5,000 confirmed in code (line 998 PortalPage.jsx). Signal shows 84%/OPERATIONAL with pulse=100%.
